steps.title: Identify the narrative tense
steps.content: The passage is told entirely in past tense: “first touched down on July 4, 2004” and “spent over six years gathering information.” The action of naming the rock took place during this completed past period.

steps.title: Choose the past-tense verb form
steps.content: Named is simple past tense, which continues the tense established by “first touched down” and “spent over six years.” The other choices (names, has named, is naming) all use present-oriented forms, breaking narrative consistency. That matches choice A — A is correct.
